sentences.target: On visite un château près de Tours.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vizit œ̃ ʃɑ.to pʁɛ də tuʁ/

translations.fr: On visite un château près de Tours.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vizit œ̃ ʃɑ.to pʁɛ də tuʁ/
translations.en: We’re visiting a castle near Tours.
translations.es: Estamos visitando un castillo cerca de Tours.
translations.de: Wir besichtigen ein Schloss in der Nähe von Tours.
translations.it: Stiamo visitando un castello vicino a Tours.
translations.ko: 우리는 투르 근처의 성을 방문하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在图尔附近参观一座城堡。
translations.yue: 我哋喺圖爾附近參觀一座城堡。
translations.ru: Мы посещаем замок рядом с Туром.
translations.pt: Estamos visitando um castelo perto de Tours.
translations.tr: Tours yakınında bir şato ziyaret ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tham quan một lâu đài gần Tours.
translations.nl: We bezoeken een kasteel bij Tours.
translations.hi: हम टूर्स के पास एक किले का दौरा कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Επισκεπτόμαστε ένα κάστρο κοντά στο Τουρ.
translations.nb: Vi besøker et slott nær Tours.
translations.id: Kami mengunjungi sebuah kastil dekat Tours.
translations.sv: Vi besöker ett slott nära Tours.
translations.da: Vi besøger et slot nær Tours.
translations.ja: 私たちはトゥール近くの城を見学しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (3rd person singular) serving as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with ‘On’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun ‘château’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘visite’.
Adverb forming the complex preposition ‘près de’ expressing proximity.
Preposition linking ‘près’ to its complement.
Proper noun (city); complement of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Tu prends la sortie pour le château.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ la sɔʁti puʁ lə ʃɑ.to/

translations.fr: Tu prends la sortie pour le château.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ la sɔʁti puʁ lə ʃɑ.to/
translations.en: Take the exit for the castle.
translations.es: Toma la salida hacia el castillo.
translations.yue: 喺去城堡嗰個出口駛出。
translations.pt: Pegue a saída para o castelo.
translations.vi: Rẽ vào lối ra hướng đến lâu đài.
translations.nl: Neem de afrit naar het kasteel.
translations.hu: Hajts ki a kijáraton a kastély felé.
translations.el: Πάρε την έξοδο για το κάστρο.
translations.ja: 城への出口で降りてください。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular) agreeing with ‘Tu’.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘sortie’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘prends’.
Preposition introducing a purpose/destination phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘château’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: J’aimerais louer une salle au château.

translations.fr: J’aimerais louer une salle au château.
translations.en: I’d like to rent a room at the castle.
translations.es: Me gustaría alquilar una sala en el castillo.
translations.de: Ich möchte einen Saal im Schloss mieten.
translations.it: Vorrei affittare una sala al castello.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想在城堡里租一间大厅。
translations.yue: 我想喺城堡入面租一個大禮堂。
translations.ru: Я хотел бы арендовать зал в замке.
translations.pt: Gostaria de alugar uma sala no castelo.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn thuê một phòng lớn tại lâu đài.
translations.nl: Ik zou graag een zaal in het kasteel huren.
translations.uk: Я хотів би орендувати залу в замку.
translations.hu: Szeretnék bérelni egy termet a kastélyban.
translations.hi: मैं किले में एक सभागार किराए पर लेना चाहूँगा.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα να νοικιάσω μια αίθουσα στο κάστρο.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne leie en sal på slottet.
translations.id: Saya ingin menyewa sebuah aula di kastil.
translations.sv: Jag skulle vilja hyra en sal i slottet.
translations.ro: Aș dori să închiriez o sală la castel.
translations.cs: Chtěl bych si pronajmout sál na zámku.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne leje en sal på slottet.
translations.ja: 城でホールを借りたいです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before vowel-initial verb (1st person singular).
Main verb, conditional present (1st person singular), expressing a wish/politeness.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement (xcomp) of ‘aimerais’.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘salle’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘louer’.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the masculine singular article ‘le’ (à + le); introduces a location/destination phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.

sentences.target: Le film se passe dans un château.
sentences.reading: /lə film sə pas dɑ̃ zœ̃ ʃɑ.to/

translations.fr: Le film se passe dans un château.
translations.ipa: /lə film sə pas dɑ̃ zœ̃ ʃɑ.to/
translations.en: The movie takes place in a castle.
translations.es: La película transcurre en un castillo.
translations.de: Der Film spielt in einem Schloss.
translations.it: Il film è ambientato in un castello.
translations.zh-Hans: 电影发生在一座城堡里。
translations.yue: 部電影喺城堡入面發生。
translations.pt: O filme se passa em um castelo.
translations.vi: Bộ phim diễn ra trong một lâu đài.
translations.nl: De film speelt zich af in een kasteel.
translations.hi: फिल्म एक किले में घटित होती है.
translations.el: Η ταινία διαδραματίζεται σε ένα κάστρο.
translations.sv: Filmen utspelar sig på ett slott.
translations.ja: 映画は城を舞台にしている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘film’.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Reflexive clitic pronoun forming the pronominal verb ‘se passer’ (3rd person).
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) in pronominal construction.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘château’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.
